overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character paddling a canoe down a river through a wilderness area. The journey begins under a wooden trestle bridge, continues through open water with forested banks, enters a narrow rocky canyon, and ends approaching a waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: river passage under wooden trestle bridge

events.description: entering shaded area beneath the wooden bridge deck
emerging from under bridge back into open sky

agents.ego_description: paddling canoe steadily toward and passing underneath a wooden bridge

entered.detail: long wooden railway bridge with multiple support pillars spanning the river
dense green trees lining the left riverbank
dense green trees lining the right riverbank
tall smokestack emitting dark smoke visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a canoe approaching a long wooden trestle bridge spanning the river. The character paddles underneath the bridge structure, passing through temporary shade created by the overhead deck and support beams, then emerges back into open morning light.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river bend with forested shoreline

events.description: canoe turns left to follow the river bend

agents.ego_description: paddling along open water following the river's leftward curve

entered.detail: massive gray rock outcrop with layered sedimentary structure on the right bank

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the bridge, the canoe travels through open water along a forested river bend. The camera turns left following the river's curve, revealing a large rock formation on the right bank while the forested shoreline draws closer on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep stratified rock walls

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage between high rock walls
canoe navigates through tight winding section of canyon

agents.ego_description: paddling through narrow canyon with tall rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall with layered sedimentary formations and sparse vegetation
massive stratified rock cliff face with green moss and small trees on top
large layered rock formation with distinct horizontal striations ahead in the canyon

segments.scene_description: The river narrows dramatically as the canoe enters a canyon with towering rock walls on both sides. The forested banks give way to steep stratified cliffs, and the waterway winds through the enclosed rocky passage with sparse vegetation visible only on the clifftops.

events.description: water becomes turbulent and mist rises as waterfall approaches
canoe enters rapids and drops toward waterfall

agents.ego_description: paddling toward a waterfall as the water becomes increasingly turbulent and misty

entered.detail: turbulent white water and waterfall drop at the end of the canyon
thick mist rising from the waterfall creating atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens slightly to reveal a waterfall ahead, with mist rising from the turbulent rapids. The water becomes choppy and the visibility drops due to spray as the canoe approaches the final drop, with the canyon walls receding into misty obscurity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey by canoe that begins under a rustic bridge and progresses through an increasingly enclosed wilderness toward a misty waterfall. It begins by gliding beneath the heavy beams of a wooden trestle bridge, passing through a momentary shadow before emerging back into the bright morning light. As the canoe clears the bridge, the river curves through open water and forested banks, with the camera turning left to follow the bend past a large rock formation. The scene then shifts as the river narrows dramatically, replacing the trees with towering stratified cliffs that enclose the waterway within a steep rocky canyon. Finally, the canyon opens slightly to reveal a distant waterfall, where the water becomes choppy and the surrounding walls fade into a thick veil of rising mist and spray.
